V

validateAndCapture() - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Validates step 1 and captures the edited values; same rules as the old dialog (date required, party ≥ 1, time optional → null).

visibleWhen - Variable in record class client.view.MainShellController.NavItem
The field for the visibleWhen record component.
visibleWhen() - Method in record class client.view.MainShellController.NavItem
Returns the value of the visibleWhen record component.
VisitController - Class in server.control
Owns the visit domain: park entry by reservation, exit, casual walk-ins, and live occupancy.
VisitController() - Constructor for class server.control.VisitController
Creates the visit controller.
visitCount - Variable in class common.dto.VisitsReportRow
Number of visits in this category (open and closed).
visitDao - Variable in class server.control.VisitController
Visit data access (open/close visits, occupancy).
VisitDAO - Class in server.dao
Data access object for the visit table — one row per party that physically enters a park, by reservation or as a casual walk-in.
VisitDAO() - Constructor for class server.dao.VisitDAO
Creates the visit DAO.
visitDate - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Edited visit date, captured on Review (ISO yyyy-MM-dd).
visitDate - Variable in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Scheduled visit date, ISO yyyy-MM-dd.
visitDate - Variable in class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
Visit date the queued reservation is for, ISO yyyy-MM-dd (joined).
VisitDTO - Class in common.dto
Immutable data transfer object representing a single visit row — one party's actual entry into a park (by reservation or as a casual walk-in).
VisitDTO(int, Integer, int, Long, String, String, int, Integer, VisitType) - Constructor for class common.dto.VisitDTO
Creates a fully populated visit.
visitor - Variable in class client.app.Session
The logged-in visitor (visitor login-by-ID), or null.
VISITOR_ONLY - Static variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Visible to visitors only.
VisitorDTO - Class in common.dto
Immutable data transfer object representing a visitor who logged in by national ID.
VisitorDTO(long, String, String, String, boolean) - Constructor for class common.dto.VisitorDTO
Creates a fully populated visitor.
visitorExists(long) - Method in class server.dao.MemberDAO
Checks whether a visitor row already exists for the given national ID.
visitorField - Variable in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Visitor-id input (prefilled and locked for a logged-in visitor).
visitorField - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController
Visitor-id input (prefilled and locked for a logged-in visitor).
visitorId - Variable in record class client.view.UserLoginController.Quick
The field for the visitorId record component.
visitorId - Variable in class client.view.WaitlistController
The logged-in visitor's national id; their waiting list is the one shown.
visitorId - Variable in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
National-ID-style identifier of the owning visitor.
visitorId - Variable in class common.dto.VisitDTO
National-ID-style identifier of the visitor, or null if anonymous.
visitorId - Variable in class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
National-ID-style identifier of the owning visitor (joined).
visitorId() - Method in record class client.view.UserLoginController.Quick
Returns the value of the visitorId record component.
visitorIdField - Variable in class client.view.UserLoginController
Visitor national-id input.
visitorPane - Variable in class client.view.UserLoginController
Pane with the visitor credential field.
visitorPending - Variable in class client.view.DashboardController
Count of the visitor's PENDING reservations (drives the alert line).
visitorTab - Variable in class client.view.UserLoginController
Tab selecting visitor login.
visitorUnread - Variable in class client.view.DashboardController
Count of the visitor's unread notifications (drives the alert line).
visitorWaiting - Variable in class client.view.DashboardController
Count of the visitor's WAITING reservations (drives the alert line).
visitsByType(String, String, Integer) - Method in class server.dao.ReportDAO
Visits-by-type report: per-category visit counts and average stay lengths over a date range, optionally narrowed to a single park.
visitsReport(String, String, Integer) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Runs the Visits-by-Type report (DEPT_MANAGER only — the server re-checks the role).
VisitsReportController - Class in client.view
Visits-by-Type report screen, visible to a DEPT_MANAGER only (gated in MainShellController).
VisitsReportController(NetworkService, Session) - Constructor for class client.view.VisitsReportController
Creates the visits-report controller.
VisitsReportController.ParkOption - Record Class in client.view
Park dropdown entry: carries the id (null for "All parks") but renders the name.
VisitsReportDTO - Class in common.dto
Result of the Visits-by-Type report: per-category visit counts and average stay lengths over a date range, optionally narrowed to one park.
VisitsReportDTO(String, String, Integer, List<VisitsReportRow>) - Constructor for class common.dto.VisitsReportDTO
Creates a fully populated visits report.
VisitsReportRow - Class in common.dto
One grouped row of the Visits-by-Type report: the aggregate figures for a single visitor category over the report's date range and park filter.
VisitsReportRow(String, int, double) - Constructor for class common.dto.VisitsReportRow
Creates a fully populated report row.
visitTime - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Edited visit time, captured on Review (HH:mm:ss, or null).
visitTime - Variable in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Scheduled visit time (HH:mm:ss), or null if unset.
visitType - Variable in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Nature of the visit (individual/family/group).
visitType - Variable in class common.dto.VisitDTO
Nature of the visit (casual visits only), or null for a reservation visit.
VisitType - Enum Class in common.dto
The nature of a park visit booked on a ReservationDTO.
VisitType() - Constructor for enum class common.dto.VisitType
